steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says tribal economic activity totaled over $7.3 billion and ranked it 'above ______.' The blank must correctly rank $7.3 billion against the three table industries: accommodation/food services ($5.2 billion), retail ($10.7 billion), and health care ($13.7 billion).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'both accommodation/food services and retail but below health care.': $7.3 billion is above accommodation/food services ($5.2B) but below retail ($10.7B), not above it. This ranking is wrong. ✗
  • Choice B — 'accommodation/food services but below both health care and retail.': $7.3B exceeds $5.2B (accommodation/food services) and falls below $10.7B (retail) and $13.7B (health care). This ranking is accurate. ✓
  • Choice C — 'health care, retail, and accommodation/food services.': This claims $7.3B outranks all three industries, including health care ($13.7B) and retail ($10.7B). Both figures exceed $7.3B, so this is wrong. ✗
  • Choice D — 'accommodation/food services and nearly equal to health care and retail.': $7.3B is not close to health care ($13.7B) or retail ($10.7B) — it is $3.4B and $6.4B below those figures respectively. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
